comment: feat: add opt-in 'Compiled but Risky' detection to analyze — nonreactive-store-read (getState()/getXStore().field/destructure) and hidden-selector-hook (store.use.field() property-chain selectors the compiler memoizes around), plus cross-file wrapper resolution (resolveWrappers) that follows first-party helper calls and re-export barrels to the risky leaf, and an 'all-safe' annotate mode that opts in 'use memo' everywhere except risk-flagged functions (which get a justified 'use no memo' bailout). Configured via --risk-config and validated against a shipped risk-config.schema.json.
